build.details: Build completed successfully with 3 performance warnings (asset size limits)

issues.description: BaseControl component has label property but missing id property

registration.details: block.json is valid, all required files exist

attributes.details: All attributes properly defined in block.json with correct types and defaults

edgeCases.details: Tested long content, minimal content, empty states - all render correctly

testsRun.details: Play button hides and video begins playing as expected

accessibility.details: All accessibility fixes from planning phase have been applied correctly

verifiedFixes.implementation: aria-label="Play video" applied to button element
aria-hidden="true" applied to icon wrapper span

verifiedFixes.requirement: YouTube/Vimeo iframes must have title attribute
verifiedFixes.implementation: title="YouTube video player" and title="Vimeo video player" applied to all iframes

markupDuplication.details: No unnecessary duplication found. Block uses responsive CSS classes appropriately.

issues.description: PHP template manually extracts attributes instead of using auto-extracted variables
issues.details: PHP directly accesses $images, $videoSource, $videoFile, $videoId, $posterImage from $attributes array. These should be auto-extracted variables with @var docblock.
issues.fix: Remove manual extraction. Add @var docblock for all camelCase attribute variables at top of PHP file.

issues.details: PHP uses camelCase variables like $darkMode, $isReversed, $reverseRows, $mediaType, $imageLayout, $videoSource, $videoFile, $videoId, $posterImage without @var docblock declarations
issues.fix: Add comprehensive @var docblock at top of file listing all auto-extracted attribute variables

innerBlocks.reason: Block does not use inner blocks

specCompliance.details: Test page contains all 14 variations specified in planning spec. All media IDs replaced with real values (19, 18, 17, 34).

issues.description: BaseControl component in TSX has label but missing id property
issues.fix: Add id property to BaseControl component: id="video-url-control"

issues.description: PHP template manually extracts attributes from $attributes array
issues.fix: Remove line 2 manual extraction. Add @var docblock with all attribute variables: $anchor, $isReversed, $reverseRows, $darkMode, $eyebrow, $heading, $description, $buttons, $mediaType, $imageLayout, $images, $videoSource, $videoFile, $videoId, $posterImage. Update variable usage to include null coalescing operators for safety (e.g., $heading ?? '')

issues.description: PHP line 2 extracts $hasImageMedia, $hasVideo, $hasMedia as computed variables instead of using attributes directly
issues.fix: Move $hasImageMedia, $hasVideo, $hasMedia calculations below the opening <?php tag after the @var docblock. These are computed helper variables, not attributes, so they should be separate from the auto-extracted attributes.

issues.description: Missing @var docblock for auto-extracted camelCase attribute variables
issues.fix:
Add comprehensive @var docblock at top of file:
<?php
/**
 * ContentWithMedia frontend template.
 *
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var string|null $anchor
 * @var bool $isReversed
 * @var bool $reverseRows
 * @var bool $darkMode
 * @var string $eyebrow
 * @var string $heading
 * @var string $description
 * @var array $buttons
 * @var string $mediaType
 * @var string $imageLayout
 * @var array $images
 * @var string $videoSource
 * @var int|null $videoFile
 * @var string $videoId
 * @var array $posterImage
 *
 * Also available:
 * @var WP_Block $block Block instance
 */
?>

passedChecks: All 14 test page variations render as expected
Accessibility fixes properly applied (aria-label, aria-hidden, iframe titles)
Video play button interaction works correctly
Dark mode border radius changes applied consistently (rounded-xl in dark mode)
Long content edge cases handled properly

accessibilityNotes.imageAltText: All images use wp_get_attachment_image() which pulls alt text from WordPress media library. Images currently have empty alt text in the test data - this is an editorial concern, not a code issue.
accessibilityNotes.darkModeBorderRadius: Verified that single image layout correctly applies rounded-xl in dark mode (PHP lines 79-80). This matches gallery layout (108-109) and video container (197-198).
accessibilityNotes.prefersReducedMotion: Block uses transition-colors on play button hover. Theme should handle prefers-reduced-motion globally - to be verified in Design QA.
